stages.prompt: One way I will use money responsibly is ___.
One time I made a responsible financial decision was ___.
One way to avoid wasting money is ___.
One ethical way to earn money is ___.
One way I will help others with money is ___.

result.winMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries! Great job reflecting on financial responsibility!
result.lesson: Lesson: Being responsible with money means making ethical choices, avoiding waste, and helping others when possible!
result.loseMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries. Remember, financial responsibility is a key skill for life!
result.tip: Tip: Think about how your financial choices impact yourself and others around you!
